subcodes.first_line: O Abraham, friend of God! The heartfelt letter which thou didst send through Jinab-i-Amin hath been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خلیل الله ابراهیم دل رحیم نامه که بواسطه جناب امین ارسال نموده بودی رسید
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
